title: Fig. 4 in A new ichthyosaur from the Lower Jurassic of Portugal (Iberian Peninsula)
author: Sousa, João Pratas E
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 4. Phylogenetic relationships of Gadusaurus aqualigneus gen. et sp. nov. (ML 2750) by New Technology search method in TNT, based on the matrix of Laboury et al. (2022). Strict consensus (condensed) tree of 13 most parsimonious trees with 1639 evolutionary steps. Numbers of each node indicate the bootstrap frequencies over 50%. Some taxa have been grouped into higher-rank clades (complete version in SOM) and 42 taxa have been excluded using the Iter-PCR tool.
steps_raw: Fig. 4. Phylogenetic relationships of Gadusaurus aqualigneus gen. et sp. nov. (ML 2750) by New Technology search method in TNT, based on the matrix of Laboury et al. (2022).
